name: projectionist room
hints: There is a movie projector here but it is empty. You may find film elsewhere.
The movie film cartridge is in the control room. Load it into the projector for useful information.
LOAD FILM into the projector when you have the film cartridge from the control room. DOWN returns to maintenance.
notes: Projectionist room with an empty movie projector. The film cartridge (found in the control room, room 19) can be loaded to view important information. DOWN returns to maintenance room 2 (room 17).
